description_te: Junior lawyers కి ₹5,000 నెలవారీ stipend. 3 సంవత్సరాల వరకు. Practice establish చేసుకోవడానికి.
description_en: ₹5,000 monthly stipend for junior lawyers for up to 3 years to establish their practice.

eligibility_criteria.profession: Enrolled advocate (within first 3 years of practice)
eligibility_criteria.bar_council: Must be enrolled with AP Bar Council
excluded: Advocates with more than 3 years experience

application_process_te:
1. Online portal లో apply
2. Bar Council enrollment verify
3. District legal services authority approval
4. Monthly DBT
